item.title:
ChrisHammer180: Chris Hammer @ChrisHammer180 · 1min "I was drenched with beer after two hours! I still don't like beer actually!"
Gian
item.description:
Chris Hammer @ChrisHammer180 · 1min "I was drenched with beer after two hours! I still don't like beer actually!"
Gian van Veen on his memories of being in the Premier League Darts crowd in Rotterdam as he prepares to walk out as Dutch number one... 1:42 2 3 18

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 4min “All the players really do struggle. I think they leave the aircon on. It’s crazy. People don’t
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 4min “All the players really do struggle. I think they leave the aircon on. It’s crazy. People don’t believe how bad it is.”
Luke Humphries fears the Rotterdam breeze could blow his Premier League hopes away.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/humphries-fear s-rotterdam-breeze/ …
In association with Mostrar más 51
